message:
test(proptest): cargo fmt import reordering + expand tantivy_reindex property tests

Import reordering (4 files, cargo fmt):
- proptest_build_coord.rs: alphabetize build_coord imports
- proptest_dataflow.rs: reorder std::sync imports (Arc before atomic)
- proptest_gc.rs: alphabetize gc module imports
- proptest_retry.rs: alphabetize retry module imports

proptest_tantivy_reindex.rs (+36 lines):
- BackfillRange Debug output is non-empty for all variants
- BackfillRange Clone preserves variant equality
- ReindexProgress Clone preserves all fields
- ReindexProgress Debug output is non-empty

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
